title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
desc: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Deewana
desc: A newlywed Kajal gets widowed when her husband, Ravi, is killed by his enemies. She moves to another city and gets married to Raja, but her life takes a turn when Ravi returns from the dead.

title: Rupban
desc: A 12-year-old Rupban is married to Rahim when he is just 12 days old. However, their lives take a turn when Rahim grows older, only to refuse to accept Rupban as his wife and fall in love with Tajel.

title: Agnipath
desc: Sujay, Ajay and Bijay are three siblings who share a close bond and can go to any length to protect each other. However, when Sujay is killed by his own boss, Bijay sets out to exact revenge.

title: Dan Protidan
desc: Ashok becomes distraught following the demise of his wife. In a bid to usurp his wealth, Dilip, Ashok's cousin, takes advantage of the situation and begins to torture him.

title: Ashirbad
desc: Brijlal, a cunning entrepreneur, plots to kill his partner and his son. However, the son survives and years later, ends up falling in love with Brijlal's daughter.
